comment:
1 способ:
Раскроем модуль:
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 3-5x\geq 0\\ 25x^{2} -3( 3-5x) < 30x-9 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} 3-5x< 0\\ 25x^{2} +3( 3-5x) < 30x-9 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 5x\leq 3\\ 25x^{2} -9+15x-30x+9< 0 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} 5x >3\\ 25x^{2} +9-15x-30x+9< 0 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\leq \frac{3}{5}\\ 25x^{2} -15x< 0 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x >\frac{3}{5}\\ 25x^{2} -45x+18< 0 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \\ \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\leq \frac{3}{5}\\ x( 5x-3) < 0 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x >\frac{3}{5}\\ ( 5x-3)( 5x-6) < 0 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x\leq \frac{3}{5}\\ x\left( x-\frac{3}{5}\right) < 0 \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x >\frac{3}{5}\\ \left( x-\frac{3}{5}\right)\left( x-\frac{6}{5}\right) < 0 \end{cases} \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
1 система:
2 система:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} x >0\\ x< \frac{3}{5} \end{cases}\\ \begin{cases} x >\frac{3}{5}\\ x< \frac{6}{5} \end{cases} \end{array} \right.$$
2 способ:
$$25x^2-3|3-5x|<30x-9\\ 25x^2-30x+9-3|3-5x|<0\\ (5x-3)^2-3|3-5x|<0$$
Так как: \(|3-5x|^2=(5x-3)^2\), то пусть \(|3-5x|=t\)
$$t^2-3t<0\\ t(t-3)<0$$
$$0<t<3\\ \displaystyle \begin{cases} |3-5x| >0\\ |3-5x|< 3 \end{cases} \Rightarrow \begin{cases} 3-5x\neq 0\\ -3< 3-5x< 3 \end{cases} \Rightarrow \begin{cases} x\neq \frac{3}{5}\\ -6< -5x< 0 \end{cases} \Rightarrow \begin{cases} x\neq \frac{3}{5}\\ \frac{6}{5} >x >0 \end{cases}$$
$$x\in \left(0;\frac{3}{5}\right)\cup \left(\frac{3}{5};\frac{6}{5}\right)$$
Ответ: \(\left(0;\frac{3}{5}\right)\cup \left(\frac{3}{5};\frac{6}{5}\right)\)
